2233610.name: Mortal Trace
2233610.description:
PvP "snake" game where players navigate through an arena leaving a "Trace" behind where they were. The Trace is like the tail in the classic snake game where you have to avoid your tail or be eliminated. But, you have to not only look out for your own Trace but also for your opponents who will be trying to cut off your path with their own Trace's. Last one left untouched by the growing Trace's wins.

Game inspired by the 1981 split screen multiplayer 2D snake game called "Snafu", and by the "light cycle" battles of the Tron franchise.

-CLICK "Request Access" for an automatic access to the playtest-
